The '''SM-series scavenger droid''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to examine starship wrecks and scavenge what it could. They would also make sure it was safe for organics to explore. It operated best in zero-gravity conditions, and would always work with a partner, so if one was destroyed, the other could film its demise.<ref name="TEGtD" />

The fleet hauler [[Steadfast (carrier)|''Steadfast'']] deployed SM scavenger droids at the derelict [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial I-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gnisnal]]'' in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], where they found a [[Memory bank/Legends|memory core]] containing an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Order of Battle/Legends|Order of Battle]] that was instrumental in resolving the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].<ref name="TEGtD" />
